song.title: There is a Redeemer
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) There is a Redeemer— Jesus, God’s own Son; Precious Lamb of God, Messiah, Holy One.
[C] Chorus Thank You, O my Father, For giving us Your Son, And leaving Your Spirit till the work on earth is done.
[V2] 2) Jesus, my Redeemer, Name above all names; Precious Lamb of God, Messiah, Hope for sinners slain.
[V3] 3) When I stand in Glory, I will see His face; There I’ll serve my King forever In that holy place.
song.author: Melody Steiner Green
